allow: PowerShell(npm install @mdx-js/react remark-gfm remark-math rehype-katex katex)

PowerShell($base = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rmcelreath/rethinking/master/data"; foreach \($f in @\("rugged.csv","tulips.csv"\)\) { Invoke-WebRequest "$base/$f" -OutFile "web/public/data/datasets/$f" }; Get-ChildItem web/public/data/datasets | Select-Object Name, Length)

PowerShell($rows = Import-Csv "web\\public\\data\\datasets\\Trolley.csv" -Delimiter ';'; $agg = $rows | Group-Object action, intention, contact | ForEach-Object { $g = $_.Group[0]; $counts = @\(0,0,0,0,0,0,0\); foreach \($r in $_.Group\) { $counts[[int]$r.response - 1]++ }; [PSCustomObject]@{ action = [int]$g.action; intention = [int]$g.intention; contact = [int]$g.contact; n = $_.Count; counts = $counts } }; $agg | Sort-Object action, contact, intention | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3 | Out-File -Encoding utf8 "web\\public\\data\\datasets\\trolley_counts.json"; Get-Content "web\\public\\data\\datasets\\trolley_counts.json")

PowerShell($d = "C:\\Users\\am5e18\\Documents\\Claude\\Projects\\Golem_Workshop_Course\\web\\public\\data\\datasets"; $rows = Import-Csv "$d\\Trolley.csv" -Delimiter ';'; $agg = $rows | Group-Object action, intention, contact | ForEach-Object { $g = $_.Group[0]; $counts = @\(0,0,0,0,0,0,0\); foreach \($r in $_.Group\) { $counts[[int]$r.response - 1]++ }; [PSCustomObject]@{ action = [int]$g.action; intention = [int]$g.intention; contact = [int]$g.contact; n = $_.Count; counts = $counts } }; $json = $agg | Sort-Object action, contact, intention | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3 -Compress; [IO.File]::WriteAllText\("$d\\trolley_counts.json", $json\); $json)
